tasks.title: Prototype KO->EN back-translation
tasks.rationale: round trip needs a back-translator; sample N for self-consistency

tasks.title: Build hybrid SNOMED search (lexical + embeddings)
tasks.rationale: the linkage check needs ranked retrieval over FSN+synonyms

tasks.title: Define round-trip confidence metric (rank/similarity)
tasks.rationale: turn linkage into a calibrated per-item score

tasks.title: Investigate per-translation confidence signal
tasks.rationale: the Output concept needs a confidence to triage review

tasks.title: Build a SNOMED semantic index (new function node)
tasks.rationale: Index FSN+synonyms for back-translation lookup; today only data-pair embeddings exist.

tasks.title: Compare SNOMED indexing strategies (dense / lexical / hybrid)
tasks.rationale: Retrieval quality of the round trip depends on the index; try variants.

tasks.title: Ingest the Korean SNOMED extension as gold KO<->concept pairs
tasks.rationale: snomedct-kr gives gold pairs to drive + evaluate the method.

tasks.title: Define a closeness/distance metric for retrieved concepts
tasks.rationale: Need rank + similarity + hierarchy distance to score how close we got.

tasks.title: Compare rerankers: cross-encoder vs LLM vs calculated metrics
tasks.rationale: Lookup returns many candidates; the reranker choice drives precision.

tasks.title: Obtain the International-edition RF2 release locally (EN FSN+synonyms source)
tasks.rationale: Decision: local RF2 for fast access; only the KR extension is local today.

tasks.title: Define the index DataObject meta schema (rf2_release, embedding_model, strategy, dim, counts)
tasks.rationale: Make the index's build config legible + reproducible across embedding models.

tasks.title: Compose the back-translation-confidence flow (after building blocks exist)
tasks.rationale: No existing flow is adaptable (all are translate->evaluate); the needed function nodes don't exist yet, so build the blocks first, then wire the flow.

tasks.title: SME-labelled error-detection test
tasks.rationale: Back-translation can't flag MT errors under string/embedding labels (note-error-detection); the real test needs genuinely-wrong candidates with human (SME) ACCEPTABLE/PARTIAL/WRONG labels.

tasks.title: Compare hierarchy-trained embeddings (HiT/OnT) vs BGE-M3 for retrieval
tasks.rationale: Test SNOMED-hierarchy-trained hyperbolic encoders (example_ret_script) as the index embedder; do they improve back-translation concept recall? (in progress).

gates.description: terminologist confirms the confidence signal tracks real review need
